zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers於1066年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon36歲，母親Emma FitzOsbern43歲。他和Adelise de Peverel至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1107年9月8日在英國英格蘭多瑟特莫斯特頓享年41歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪可騰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers was born in 1066, in Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon, was 36 and his mother, Emma FitzOsbern, was 43. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Adelise de Peverel. He died on 8 September 1107, in Mosterton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Cotentin, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers est né en 1066, à Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma FitzOsbern, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Adelise de Peverel. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1107, à Mosterton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Cotentin, Normandie, France.

Er hatte mit Adelise de Peverel mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers(이)가 1066년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma FitzOsbern(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Adelise de Peverel(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1107년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 모스터턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 컷틴에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Adelise de Peverel. ru.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers родился в 1066 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma FitzOsbern, 43. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Adelise de Peverel. Он умер 8 сентября 1107 г. в местности мустиртон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности котентинь, норманди, Франция.

Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1107, en Mosterton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Cotentin, Normandie, Francia.
